name: Triple Cheese Pasta Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp snipped fresh oregano or basil
1/2 pkg cream cheese (8 oz), cut into pieces
snipped fresh oregano or basil - optional
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, cook corkscrew macaroni in lightly salted boiling water for 7 minutes.
2. Add the frozen vegetables; return to boiling. Cook for 2 more minutes or until pasta is tender.
3. Drain well.
4. In a screw-top jar, combine flour, salt, pepper, nutmeg, and dried herb (if using).
5. Gradually add milk, shaking well. Transfer to a large saucepan.
6. Add remaining milk. Cook and stir over medium-high heat until slightly thickened and bubbly.
7. Gradually add cheeses, stirring until melted.
8. Stir in cooked pasta and vegetables and fresh herbs (if using).
9. Transfer mixture to a lightly greased 3-quart rectangular baking dish.
10. Bake, covered, in a 350°F oven for 25 minutes or until heated through.
11. Garnish with thinly sliced plum tomatoes and additional snipped fresh oregano or basil if desired.
